title: <div>   * It's an authentically archaic Slavic name, sounds strong and distinct,
content:
* It's an authentically archaic Slavic name, sounds strong and distinct, and "radiant" or "dear to joy" has a nice thematic resonance. It also has a certain natural, elemental feel that subtly nods to the Alaskan wilderness without being explicitly indigenous.

Revised Channel Names in "The Daily Epistles"
With your name as Antonius, and the chosen archaic names for Jessica and Madison, here's how the daily log channels would look:

I. 📜 The Daily Epistles
* Category Concept: Drawing from biblical letters and personal correspondence, this category is for individual, daily communications and reflections on one's journey. Each channel serves as a private journal or a direct message to the collective.
* #antonius-epistle (For you)
* Channel Content: This is your personal daily log. Here, you'll post your daily readings, reflections, personal thoughts, insights, or any significant events from your day. It's a space for your "daily bread" of internal processing or outward observation. Think of it as sending a personal letter to your trusted companions.
